author: punkyard
description: Automatically converts pasted YouTube links into your preferred embed format on an empty line. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

### Bug fixes
- Add `evt.defaultPrevented` guard to `editor-paste` handler (#13, PR #25)
- Fix unsafe `any` type in `loadSettings` (#14, PR #25)
- Replace `document.createDocumentFragment()` with `createFragment()` (#15, PR #25)
- Use `activeDocument` instead of `document` for popout window compatibility (#16, PR #25)
- Replace `createEl('span')` with `createSpan()` ×3 (#17, PR #25)
- Pin `obsidian` dependency to `1.13.1` — prevents supply chain attacks (#18, PR #26)
- Commit `package-lock.json` for reproducible builds (#19, PR #26)
- Remove zip artifact from release assets — only `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` (#20, PR #27)
- Align `package.json` license field with GPL-3.0 `LICENSE` file (#23, PR #24)

### Improvements
- Add GitHub artifact attestation for `main.js` (#21, PR #27)
- Add automated CI release workflow (`.github/workflows/release.yml`)
- Resolve manifest name mismatch — plugin now registered as 'Media Embed' (#22)

releases.author: punkyard
releases.description:
fix: robust YouTube ID extraction and trim iframe allow list for iOS (#9)

- replaced regex-based extractYoutubeId with URL parser — fixes watch?v=shorts 400 errors
- added m.youtube.com support
- trimmed iframe allow list to picture-in-picture only — eliminates iOS permissions policy warnings

releases.author: punkyard
releases.description:
- Portrait layout for YouTube Shorts (9:16 aspect ratio)
- New setting: configurable Shorts width (%, px, or any CSS value)
- Cursor moves to end of embed after paste
- Dropdown alignment fix in Settings

releases.author: punkyard
releases.description:
## What's new

- paste a YouTube URL on an empty line → auto-converted to your preferred embed
- three embed styles: markdown, iframe, div
- responsive iframe and div modes (desktop + mobile)
- configure style in Settings → Video Embed

## Manual install

1. download `video-embed-v1.0.0.zip`
2. unzip into `<your vault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. reload Obsidian and enable in **Settings → Community plugins**
releases.name: v1.0.0
